prompt.description: Human-readable label shown for the widget (kgsteward:prompt).
prompt.title: Prompt

options.description: Name of the query returning the option rows. Defaults to the query the selector is declared on (kgsteward:selectQuery).
options.title: Options query

valueIndex.description: 1-based column of the option query's projection used as the value. A string is interpreted as a variable name (emitted as kgsteward:valueVar).
valueIndex.title: Value index

nameIndex.description: 1-based column of the option query's projection used as the label. A string is interpreted as a variable name (emitted as kgsteward:nameVar).
nameIndex.title: Name index

type.description: Widget kind: select, checkbox, autocomplete (all query-backed), text (free text, optional regexp) or slider (numeric range).
type.title: Widget type

prompt.description: Human-readable label shown for the widget (kgsteward:prompt).
prompt.title: Prompt

options.description: Name of the query returning the option rows. Defaults to the query the selector is declared on (kgsteward:selectQuery).
options.title: Options query

valueIndex.description: 1-based column of the option query's projection used as the value. A string is interpreted as a variable name (emitted as kgsteward:valueVar).
valueIndex.title: Value index

nameIndex.description: 1-based column of the option query's projection used as the label. A string is interpreted as a variable name (emitted as kgsteward:nameVar).
nameIndex.title: Name index

type.description: Widget kind: select, checkbox, autocomplete (all query-backed), text (free text, optional regexp) or slider (numeric range).
type.title: Widget type

target.description: Verbatim string in the query body to be replaced (kgsteward:targetStr).
target.title: Target string

widget.description: Identifier of the selector widget providing the value (kgsteward:replaceWith).
widget.title: Widget id

default.title: Default
default.description: Optional default value used when the field is left unset (kgsteward:default).

prompt.description: Human-readable label shown for the widget (kgsteward:prompt).
prompt.title: Prompt

options.description: Name of the query returning the option rows. Defaults to the query the selector is declared on (kgsteward:selectQuery).
options.title: Options query

valueIndex.description: 1-based column of the option query's projection used as the value. A string is interpreted as a variable name (emitted as kgsteward:valueVar).
valueIndex.title: Value index

nameIndex.description: 1-based column of the option query's projection used as the label. A string is interpreted as a variable name (emitted as kgsteward:nameVar).
nameIndex.title: Name index

type.description: Widget kind: select, checkbox, autocomplete (all query-backed), text (free text, optional regexp) or slider (numeric range).
type.title: Widget type

prompt.description: Human-readable label shown for the widget (kgsteward:prompt).
prompt.title: Prompt

type.description: Widget kind: select, checkbox, autocomplete (all query-backed), text (free text, optional regexp) or slider (numeric range).
type.title: Widget type

prompt.description: Human-readable label shown for the widget (kgsteward:prompt).
prompt.title: Prompt

type.description: Widget kind: select, checkbox, autocomplete (all query-backed), text (free text, optional regexp) or slider (numeric range).
type.title: Widget type

pattern.description: Regular expression validating a free-text field (text widget only; kgsteward:pattern).
pattern.title: Pattern

description: grlc decorators recognised in the `#+` comment block of a SPARQL query file

summary.description: Short one-line summary of the query, shown next to its name.
summary.title: Summary

description.description: Longer human-readable description of what the query does.
description.title: Description

endpoint.description: SPARQL endpoint the query is meant to run against. Takes precedence over any endpoint supplied by kgsteward when documenting the query (schema:target).
endpoint.title: Endpoint

endpoint_in_url.description: Whether the endpoint may be overridden through a URL parameter. grlc HTTP-API option, not reflected in the RDF documentation.
endpoint_in_url.title: Endpoint in URL

endpoint-method.description: HTTP method used to send the query to the endpoint (GET or POST). grlc HTTP-API option, not reflected in the RDF documentation.
endpoint-method.title: Endpoint method

method.description: HTTP method exposed by the generated API operation (GET or POST). grlc HTTP-API option, not reflected in the RDF documentation.
method.title: Method

pagination.description: Page size for paginated results. grlc HTTP-API option, not reflected in the RDF documentation.
pagination.title: Pagination

tags.description: List of tags used to group related queries. Emitted as schema:keywords.
tags.title: Tags

defaults.description: List of single-key mappings giving default values for grlc parameters (?_name). Applied by substitution into the returned query; parameters without a default are left untouched.
defaults.title: Defaults

enumerate.description: List of parameters offered as an enumerated choice. grlc HTTP-API option, not reflected in the RDF documentation.
enumerate.title: Enumerate

transform.description: SPARQLTransformer structure used to reshape results. grlc option, not reflected in the RDF documentation.
transform.title: Transform

source.description: Provenance of the query (e.g. an upstream sparql-examples file). Emitted as dct:source.
source.title: Source

citation.description: Bibliographic citation to credit when using the query. Emitted as schema:citation.
citation.title: Citation

param.description: Standalone parameter mechanism (list of single-key mappings). Recognised and preserved; substitution semantics are left to the parameter mechanism.
param.title: Param

selector.description: Reusable input widgets that populate form fields. Declared on the query that provides the option values.
selector.title: Selector widgets

form.description: Declares this query as a dynamic input form: a list of string substitutions, each binding a target string to a selector widget.
form.title: Input form

title: GrlcDecorators
